attacker_controlled_source: Remote peer can initiate repeated incoming validator-proof streams
sensitive_sink: tokio::spawn per accepted stream with proof read work + timeout
missing_guard_or_weak_assumption: No explicit concurrent stream/task cap in validator proof handler path; anti-spam logic executes after proof receipt event
exploit_prerequisites: Attacker can maintain connection(s) and open many substreams before disconnect/cleanup dominates
impact_if_true: Transient CPU/memory pressure and event backlog in network reactor
missing_evidence_needed_for_promotion: Deterministic stress test showing task growth or measurable degradation under malicious substream flood; confirmation of libp2p_stream default inbound limits in this integration
